opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My mouth is full of ulcers and I haven't been able to drink a drop of water all day because of the pain.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The ulcers flared up badly and it hurts too much to swallow, so I can't get any fluids down and I'm starting to feel a bit off.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 48 hours ago a couple of ulcers started, but they've really multiplied today
symptom_narrative.duration: 48 hours, much worse in the last day
symptom_narrative.character: raw, burning, stinging sores all over the inside of my mouth
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: so painful I can barely swallow — it's the worst flare I've had
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: inside my cheeks and the roof/back of my mouth
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, worse whenever I try to swallow or drink
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much — the paracetamol I took barely touched it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: swallowing, drinking, anything touching the sores
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I feel a bit dizzy when I stand up and pretty tired, probably because I haven't had anything to drink
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get mouth ulcers on and off, but never this many or this bad all at once
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can still get around the house but I'm worn out and I've basically stopped eating and drinking

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: recurring mouth ulcers that come and go
past_medical_history.how_managed: usually just wait them out or use over-the-counter gels

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives on my own, so there's no one here to help me if I get worse

objective_data_offered.value: lips look dry and cracked and I'm speaking with difficulty because of the mouth pain
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/self view over chat; not a clinician oral examination

objective_data_offered.value: I feel lightheaded when I stand up
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported sensation, no measured blood pressure available
